question.text: Settlement of client funds must be done on:

answer.text: First Friday/Saturday of the month/quarter as per Exchange pre-announced schedule
Last working day of each month
Any day chosen by the broker

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Settlement of running accounts happens on first Friday/Saturday of the month or quarter as per the Exchange's pre-announced annual calendar. **The Trap:** The dates are pre-announced by the Exchange at the beginning of the financial year, not chosen by the broker. **Cross-Exam Context:** Uniform settlement dates ensure consistency across the market. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Stock exchanges jointly issue the annual calendar for settlement dates at the beginning of each financial year.
